likely_cause: The raw energy row has invalid row-level counter evidence: elapsed time, iteration count, or total-energy counter delta is missing, nonpositive, or internally inconsistent.
corrective_action: Rerun the energy sweep and keep rows only when `elapsed_s > 0`, `ITER > 0`, `E_after_mJ > E_before_mJ`, and `delta_E_J == (E_after_mJ - E_before_mJ) / 1000`.
power_matrix_relevance: Directly affects final pJ numerator. Required policy: nvml_total_energy + total_energy_mj_delta + gpu_device_total_energy_counter

likely_cause: Power-state audit found outliers or coefficient-ineligible rows.
corrective_action: Exclude rejected rows before pairing or rerun the unstable conditions with longer seconds/repeats.

likely_cause: Treatment-control pairing lacks exact NCU denominators, positive delta_E, or matching power scope.
power_matrix_relevance: Directly affects final pJ numerator. Required policy: nvml_total_energy + total_energy_mj_delta + gpu_device_total_energy_counter

likely_cause: The combined power/NCU/matched-control evidence did not accept all required components.
corrective_action: Rerun targeted component conditions or keep weak/rejected components out of the strict summary.

likely_cause: Required artifact has not been copied back or was not generated on the target node.
corrective_action: Generate or copy the missing artifact listed in the package audit and manifest.
power_matrix_relevance: Directly affects final pJ numerator. Required policy: nvml_total_energy + total_energy_mj_delta + gpu_device_total_energy_counter

likely_cause: The strict audit is stale, missing required hierarchy/plausibility checks, or contains fail/warning rows.
corrective_action: Rerun the current `audit_strict_component_summary.py`; stale audits missing hierarchy/plausibility checks are invalid.
